고린도전서 3:1.content: Brothers, I couldn’t speak to you as to spiritual, but as to fleshly, as to babies in Christ.

고린도전서 3:2.content: I fed you with milk, not with meat; for you weren’t yet ready. Indeed, you aren’t ready even now,

고린도전서 3:3.content: for you are still fleshly. For insofar as there is jealousy, strife, and factions among you, aren’t you fleshly, and don’t you walk in the ways of men?

고린도전서 3:4.content: For when one says, “I follow Paul,” and another, “I follow Apollos,” aren’t you fleshly?

고린도전서 3:5.content: Who then is Apollos, and who is Paul, but servants through whom you believed, and each as the Lord gave to him?

고린도전서 3:6.content: I planted. Apollos watered. But God gave the increase.

고린도전서 3:7.content: So then neither he who plants is anything, nor he who waters, but God who gives the increase.

고린도전서 3:8.content: Now he who plants and he who waters are the same, but each will receive his own reward according to his own labor.

고린도전서 3:9.content: For we are God’s fellow workers. You are God’s farming, God’s building.

고린도전서 3:10.content: According to the grace of God which was given to me, as a wise master builder I laid a foundation, and another builds on it. But let each man be careful how he builds on it.

고린도전서 3:11.content: For no one can lay any other foundation than that which has been laid, which is Jesus Christ.

고린도전서 3:12.content: But if anyone builds on the foundation with gold, silver, costly stones, wood, hay, or stubble,

고린도전서 3:13.content: each man’s work will be revealed. For the Day will declare it, because it is revealed in fire; and the fire itself will test what sort of work each man’s work is.

고린도전서 3:14.content: If any man’s work remains which he built on it, he will receive a reward.

고린도전서 3:15.content: If any man’s work is burned, he will suffer loss, but he himself will be saved, but as through fire.

고린도전서 3:16.content: Don’t you know that you are a temple of God, and that God’s Spirit lives in you?

고린도전서 3:17.content: If anyone destroys God’s temple, God will destroy him; for God’s temple is holy, which you are.

고린도전서 3:18.content: Let no one deceive himself. If anyone thinks that he is wise among you in this world, let him become a fool, that he may become wise.

고린도전서 3:19.content: For the wisdom of this world is foolishness with God. For it is written, “He has taken the wise in their craftiness.”

고린도전서 3:20.content: And again, “The Lord knows the reasoning of the wise, that it is worthless.”

고린도전서 3:21.content: Therefore let no one boast in men. For all things are yours,

고린도전서 3:22.content: whether Paul, or Apollos, or Cephas, or the world, or life, or death, or things present, or things to come. All are yours,

고린도전서 3:23.content: and you are Christ’s, and Christ is God’s.
